title: Rich Uruguayan Beef Stew
description: A heartwarming, umami-packed beef stew featuring a mustard-infused deglaze, perfect for a cozy, romantic dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium‑high heat. Brown the beef cubes in batches, then set them aside.
Reduce the heat to medium and add the onion, carrots, and celery. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables soften (about 5 minutes).
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Stir in the tomato paste and flour, cooking for 2 minutes to form a roux that coats the vegetables.
Pour in the red wine to deglaze the pot, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
Add the beef broth, Dijon mustard, and bay leaf. Bring the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Return the browned beef to the pot, reduce the heat to low, cover, and let the stew simmer for 1.5 to 2 hours until the beef is fork‑tender.
Remove the bay leaf, season the stew with salt and pepper to taste, and serve hot.
